calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-19-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-02-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-19-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated June14, 2001 is admitted to probate. Sara Morimoto Swain is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for August 2, 2022, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed by two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: B. Quesada. Not reported.
